mapper.select: SELECT id, channel_id, segment_id, name, CAST(points AS CHAR) AS points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM camera_road_rois WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, channel_id, segment_id, name, CAST(points AS CHAR) AS points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM camera_road_rois WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, channel_id, segment_id, name, CAST(points AS CHAR) AS points, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM camera_road_rois ORDER BY channel_id ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO camera_road_rois (channel_id, segment_id, name, points, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{channelId}, #{segmentId}, #{name}, #{points}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE camera_road_rois SET channel_id = #{channelId}, segment_id = #{segmentId}, name = #{name}, points = #{points}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
